doc_title: Pseudonymisation Under the GDPR — EDPB Guidelines 01/2025
label: partial
reason: The content accurately reflects genuine GDPR principles and typical EDPB guidance style, but the specific 01/2025 guideline cannot be independently verified and the consultation timeline (closing after adoption) is procedurally anomalous.
